HB - Heath Blandford

Welcome.

This is a place for me to write sweet nothings about the things that I find important right now.

You can find what I'm working on right now on my now page.

Recent posts:

The AmbiLamp - I designed and 3D printed my own Ambient Lamp, and am releasing the files for anyone to make one themselves!

My struggle with Apple & iOS vs Android - I think a lot about the differences between the two mobile operating systems (and resulting ecosystems). This post intends to get all my thoughts out there.

I'm switching to Neovim - From Visual Studio Code, to Codium, to Emacs, now Neovim. I've switched for a simple reason.

Make100 - Let's make something for 100 days straight.

Hello from 11ty - The first post.
